A. The agents successfully identified the correct answer, but the interaction feels overly verbose and repetitive. The initial introductions of each agent are unnecessary for this simple task. The "SUGGESTED NEXT SPEAKER" prompts add no value. The code executor and problem solver both arrived at the same answer independently, which is redundant. The verifier simply confirms the agreement without adding any unique insight.
